assertions.query:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (
						SELECT c.id, c.name, SUM(o.amount) AS total_spent
						FROM customers c
						JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.id
						GROUP BY c.id, c.name
						HAVING SUM(o.amount) >= 1
					) q;
CREATE TRIGGER trig_name BEFORE INSERT OR UPDATE ON public.table_name FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION public.fn_name();

assertions.query:
CREATE FUNCTION public.film_in_stock(p_film_id integer, p_store_id integer, OUT p_film_count integer) RETURNS SETOF integer
    LANGUAGE sql
    AS $_$
     SELECT inventory_id
     FROM inventory
     WHERE film_id = $1
     AND store_id = $2
     AND inventory_in_stock(inventory_id);
$_$;
